series_metadata.series_title: Continuing Education Sponsor Applications and Renewal Applications
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain continuing education sponsor applications and renewal applications which include, but are not limited to; applications, program/course information, presenter information, correspondence, and evaluation materials.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: following end of biennium of last Board-approval status. ; Electronic: Computer data file: following end of biennium of last Board-approval status
